mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : SeminarAtndDAO.select 설 명 : 세미나 참석 정보 조회 */ SELECT SMNR_ATND_ID AS seminarAtndId , SMNR_ID AS seminarId , STD_ID AS stdNo , USER_ID AS userId , ATND_SDTTM AS atndDttm , ATND_SCNDS AS atndTime , ATND_STSCD AS atndCd , CNTN_DVC_TYCD AS deviceTypeCd , ATND_MEMO AS atndMemo , RGTR_IP AS regIp , RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , MOD_DTTM AS modDttm FROM TB_LMS_SMNR_ATND WHERE SMNR_ID = #{seminarId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
AND STD_ID = #{stdNo}

/* SQL ID : SeminarAtndDAO.listStd 설 명 : 세미나 참석 수강생 리스트 조회 */
select 1 from dual
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : SeminarAtndDAO.atndTimeReset 설 명 : 세미나 참석 시간 초기화 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_SMNR_ATND SET ATND_SCNDS = 0 WHERE SMNR_ID = #{seminarId}
